name: obsidian-master-plugin
description: Workspace-specific Obsidian helpers for TaskNotes capture and attachment routing.

scripts.install-vault: npm run build && mkdir -p '/Users/matthewderman/My Drive/Workspace/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-master-plugin' && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css '/Users/matthewderman/My Drive/Workspace/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-master-plugin/'

author: Matthew Derman
